title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Bank of India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Bank of India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Bank of India Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Noida location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bank of India Holdings Services:
Bank of India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of India Holdings Services!
